ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meteorological_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorological parameter */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Abbreviated name for the parameter */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full descriptive name of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., kg/m^2, K) */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement frequency */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location where the parameter is measured */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorological_parameters_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES measurement_frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., GOES-UMD) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for inquiries related to the data source */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the source was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency type (e.g., Mon-acc, Mon-ave) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the frequency means */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval of the frequency (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection record */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorological parameter being recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source where data is recorded from */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where data is collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* Recorded value of the parameter */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 0 for good, 1 for questionable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES meteorological_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, climatologist, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report document */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting tool used */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_reports_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES reporting_tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection record being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result status of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool's functionality */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the tool is active */,
  "license_key" TEXT /* License key for the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
